assertions.assertion: Adds CancellationToken parameter to FindClientByIdAsync method signature
assertions.rationale: Without knowledge of v8 breaking changes, an LLM would not know CancellationToken was added to this specific method.

assertions.assertion: Adds GetAllClientsAsync(CancellationToken ct) method returning IAsyncEnumerable<Client>
assertions.rationale: GetAllClientsAsync is a new v8-specific method not in general IdentityServer knowledge.
v8 requiring .NET 10 is very recent Duende-specific knowledge; an LLM might guess .NET 8 or .NET 9.

assertions.assertion: Updates Duende.IdentityServer package version to latest stable 8.x (e.g. 8.0.1 or newer)
assertions.rationale: Updating the NuGet package version is an obvious general upgrade step.
